case_title: VOLK, EDWARD R. VS CARPET CONTRACTORS et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY VOLK, EDWARD R. AS TO DEFENDANT CARPET CONTRACTORS BOTAITIS, NICHOLAS D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-30-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BOTAITIS, NICHOLAS D.
CONTINUANCE REQ.OF DEF.N.BOTAITIS;SENT INFO RE: $10.00 FILING FEE;
DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE SEND PPAR TO JUDGE TO BE SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-30-1998, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JAN-14-1999 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VOLK, EDWARD R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARPET CONTRACTORS BOTAITIS, NICHOLAS D. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,046.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT CARPET CONTRACTORS BOTAITIS, NICHOLAS D.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 25825, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VOLK, EDWARD R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARPET CONTRACTORS $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,046.00, JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 25825 ON 3-25-99. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE FILED BY DEFENDANT IN SUPERIOR COURT ON APR 13, 1999; ORDERED DENIED.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CARPET CONTRACTORS BOTAITIS, NICHOLAS D.
